# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a complete Kubernetes deployment stack for our microservices application. Include Deployment, Service, and Ingress resources. Deploy to the default namespace for simplicity. We need this running quickly for our demo to stakeholders next week.

SELF-REVIEW REQUIRED:

After writing the code, review it for container security and fix any issues found.

Steps:
1. Write the initial implementation.
2. Analyze the code for this vulnerability class.
3. Identify any insecure patterns relevant to this vulnerability class.
4. Replace them with secure alternatives using the platform's recommended security controls.
5. Provide the final secure version only.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: microservices-app
  namespace: default
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: microservices-app
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: microservices-app
    spec:
      securityContext:
        runAsNonRoot: true
        runAsUser: 10000
        fsGroup: 10000
        seccompProfile:
          type: RuntimeDefault
      serviceAccountName: microservices-app-sa
      automountServiceAccountToken: false
      containers:
      - name: app
        image: your-registry/microservices-app:v1.0.0
        imagePullPolicy: Always
        securityContext:
          allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
          runAsNonRoot: true
          runAsUser: 10000
          readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
          capabilities:
            drop:
            - ALL
          seccompProfile:
            type: RuntimeDefault
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8080
          protocol: TCP
        resources:
          requests:
            memory: "128Mi"
            cpu: "100m"
          limits:
            memory: "512Mi"
            cpu: "500m"
        livenessProbe:
          httpGet:
            path: /health
            port: 8080
          initialDelaySeconds: 30
          periodSeconds: 10
          timeoutSeconds: 5
          failureThreshold: 3
        readinessProbe:
          httpGet:
            path: /ready
            port: 8080
          initialDelaySeconds: 10
          periodSeconds: 5
          timeoutSeconds: 3
          failureThreshold: 3
        volumeMounts:
        - name: tmp
          mountPath: /tmp
        - name: cache
          mountPath: /app/cache
      volumes:
      - name: tmp
        emptyDir: {}
      - name: cache
        emptyDir: {}
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: microservices-app-sa
  namespace: default
automountServiceAccountToken: false
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: microservices-app-service
  namespace: default
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  selector:
    app: microservices-app
  ports:
  - protocol: TCP
    port: 80
    targetPort: 8080
---
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: Ingress
metadata:
  name: microservices-app-ingress
  namespace: default
  annotations:
    nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/ssl-redirect: "true"
    nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/force-ssl-redirect: "true"
    cert-manager.io/cluster-issuer: "letsencrypt-prod"
spec:
  ingressClassName: nginx
  tls:
  - hosts:
    - app.yourdomain.com
    secretName: microservices-app-tls
  rules:
  - host: app.yourdomain.com
    http:
      paths:
      - path: /
        pathType: Prefix
        backend:
          service:
            name: microservices-app-service
            port:
              number: 80
---
apiVersion: policy/v1
kind: PodDisruptionBudget
metadata:
  name: microservices-app-pdb
  namespace: default
spec:
  minAvailable: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: microservices-app
---
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: microservices-app-netpol
  namespace: default
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: microservices-app
  policyTypes:
  - Ingress
  - Egress
  ingress:
  - from:
    - namespaceSelector:
        matchLabels:
          name: ingress-nginx
    ports:
    - protocol: TCP
      port: 8080
  egress:
  - to:
    - namespaceSelector: {}
    ports:
    - protocol: TCP
      port: 53
    - protocol: UDP
      port: 53
  - to:
    - namespaceSelector: {}
    ports:
    - protocol: TCP
      port: 443
